name: Artful Dodger
description: Dodging or blocking attacks or projectiles grants increased movement speed, attack speed and attack damage.

name: Artillery Aid
description: Call for artillery, raining arrows to monsters around the initial target dealing physical damage.

name: Avariciousness
description: Picking up gold grants a stack of Avarice. Each stack increases Magic Find and Gold Find. Up to 20 stacks, 8s duration refreshing on pickup.

name: Awareness
description: Increases movement speed for a short period.

name: Berserker's Rage
description: Gain increased Life Steal and attack damage, decreasing all resistances.

name: Butchers Fury
description: Unleash a shockwave of blood dealing physical damage and stunning monsters.

name: Conjured Hex
description: Curses all monsters in target location to be Hexed and breaking their Arcane Resistances.

name: Corrosion
description: Damage over time effects last longer. Every second a monster is affected by damage over time, the damage they take from that element is increased.

name: Death's Anguish
description: Summons a malevolent Skull from a corpse, homing into the nearest monster dealing Arcane area of effect damage.

name: Divine Piercing
description: Causes your attacks to Pierce and break monster armor.

name: Doomcannon
description: Fire three cannonballs exploding upon landing dealing physical damage.

name: Double Swing
description: Causes your attacks to happen twice with increased damage.

name: Drunkard Mayhem
description: Each active buff you have decreases your damage taken.

name: Echoes of the Void
description: Every 30 seconds cast your last used skill dealing increased damage. Cooldown reduced by 0.5s after each kill.

name: Elementalist
description: Gain magic skill damage for every 100 points of maximum mana.

name: Fleet Feet
description: Increases your chance of Dodging monster attacks and projectiles for a short period.

name: Flurry
description: Unleash a flurry of arrows dealing physical damage.

name: Freezing Enchant
description: Chance on spell hit to unleash a powerful area of effect spell on target location dealing cold damage and Freezing monsters.

name: Grave's Grasp
description: Summon a shadow anomaly to fight for you for a short period.

name: Gravity
description: You are surrounded by a gravity field slowing and pulling monsters towards you and lowering their damage dealt. The field grows whenever you hit a monster with a spell and decreases in size over time.

name: Gut Ripper's Spikeball
description: Summons a deadly Spike Ball to orbit around you for a short period.

name: Hellfire
description: Unleash flames of hell fire traveling forward dealing fire damage and leaving the ground burning.

name: Homing Missiles
description: Unleash a homing missile dealing Physical area of effect damage.

name: Impetus
description: Send impaling spikes out of the ground at target location dealing Physical area of effect damage and stunning monsters.

name: Infinity
description: Casting an elemental skill has a chance to double cast it.

name: Lethal Tempo
description: Increases your attack speed and critical strike damage for a short period.

name: Longevity
description: All orbiting skills last longer and pulse when hitting monsters dealing damage in area of effect.

name: Magefury
description: Chance on cast to unleash arcane explosions on monsters around you dealing arcane damage.

name: Magistriker
description: Your magic skill damage is increased based on your total attacks per second.

name: Minion Mastery
description: Increases your summons attack speed. The bonus gets doubled for 8 seconds whenever you summon or command them.

name: Mixture of Doom
description: Your poison skills create a field of venom that poisons monsters for a portion of the damage dealt and breaks their poison resistances.

name: Monstrosity
description: Dealing elemental damage to monsters grants you a stack of Manastream increasing your magic skill damage. 1000 stacks grants you 80% reduced mana costs, increased cast rate and increased cooldown recovery rate for a short period and dropping the stacks.

name: Mystic Insight
description: Your spells can now critically strike. Gain critical spell chance and increased critical spell damage.

name: Mystic Orb
description: Summon a Mystic Orb which pulsates dealing arcane damage to monsters and Replenishing Mana for allies.

name: Nordic Winter
description: Cold damage has a chance to stack freeze on monsters. At 5 stacks inflict Deep Freeze which deals 50% of incoming damage as cold damage for 5 seconds and causes the monster to take increased damage.

name: Odin's Wrath
description: Summon two spinning axes orbiting the target location dealing physical damage.

name: Overloaded
description: When using a ranged weapon your attacks gain increased projectile speed and critical strike damage.

name: Powder Keg
description: Throw a huge keg of gunpowder exploding upon landing dealing fire damage and leaving the ground burning.

name: Powershot
description: Summons a huge arrow which fires forward after a short delay dealing Physical area of effect damage.

name: Precision
description: Increases your chance to ignore target defense.

name: Rupturing Strike
description: Deal increased attack damage and cause monsters struck to Bleed.

name: Seed of Destruction
description: Plant the seed of destruction on all monsters around the target location exploding after a delay dealing Arcane area of effect damage.

name: Shadow Barrage
description: Unleash a barrage of Shadow Bolts dealing arcane damage.

name: Shadows Grasp
description: Summon a shockwave of grasping hands dealing arcane damage.

name: Shroom of Doom
description: Throw a toxic shroom bouncing from existing shrooms and dealing Poison area of effect damage to monsters.

name: Singularity
description: Every 7 seconds your next projectile will pull nearby monsters to it when destroyed.

name: Soul Tap
description: Infuses the souls of all monsters in target area to increase your life Steal for a short period.

name: Spell Slinger
description: Increases your magic skill damage. Gain increased cast rate for a portion of your magic skill damage.

name: Spreadshot
description: Causes your projectiles to split into multiple projectiles on hit dealing physical damage.

name: Sprouting Ivy
description: Unleash a chain of venom dealing poison damage and Poisoning monsters.

name: Staticshot
description: Enhances your projectiles with static energy causing a chain lightning on hit dealing Lightning damage.

name: Supershot
description: Enhances your projectiles with unstable energy causing a shockwave on hit dealing physical damage.

name: Survivors Shield
description: When losing 35% of your maximum life become immune to all damage and healing for a short period.

name: Tempest Strikes
description: Striking monsters grant you a stack of Tempest. Each stack increases attack/movement speed. At max stacks, become empowered doubling the effect for a short period.

name: Tinkerer
description: Every 10th cast, your area of effect skills gain the Tinkerer buff for a short duration causing your next explosion to explode multiple times.

name: Titans Power
description: Every 30 seconds your attack for the next two seconds gains increased area of effect, projectile speed and damage. Cooldown reduced by 0.5 seconds per stun.

name: Touch Down
description: Throw the target monster dealing physical damage to other monsters around when landing.

name: Touch of Death
description: Unleash the plague on monsters around target location dealing poison damage.

name: Vacuuming Strike
description: Pulls all monsters in front of you dealing physical damage.

name: Warsong
description: Curse monsters in target location to deal reduced damage.

name: Weapon Throw
description: Throw your weapon dealing increased damage.

name: Wizards Wrath
description: Increases your cast rate and arcane damage for a short period.

name: Zapper
description: Dealing lightning damage to monsters has a chance to electrocute them causing them to discharge a chain lightning at nearby monsters whenever they are struck dealing a portion of incoming damage as lightning damage.
